overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a cyberpunk video game showing a moody high-rise apartment bedroom with an unmade bed and a large panoramic window overlooking a foggy, overcast cityscape. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by outside while the camera remains fixed, capturing the atmospheric blue-grey lighting and futuristic interior decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic window

second flying vehicle passes by outside the window from left to right

agents.ego_description: stationary in a futuristic high-rise apartment, gazing out at the foggy cityscape and passing aerial traffic through the panoramic window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window revealing foggy cityscape with flying vehicles

wall covered in dark checkered square tiles with various shades

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed inside a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom, focusing on an unmade bed with silver sheets and a massive panoramic window. Through the hazy glass, the blue-grey light of an overcast sky illuminates the room while flying vehicles occasionally drift past in the distance, emphasizing the high-rise urban setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective within a moody cyberpunk bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a private interior and a vast, futuristic cityscape. It begins focused on the dimly lit space, where the cool blue-grey light of an overcast sky filters through a massive panoramic window to illuminate an unmade bed with silver sheets. As the camera lingers, the hazy glass reveals the scale of the high-rise setting, with the distant urban horizon stretching out under a heavy gloom. The scene remains poised in this stillness, punctuated only by the occasional drift of flying vehicles passing through the foggy air outside.
